name: agent-pays-agent
description: An interactive pixel-art cartoon where two agents make a buy/sell paid over x402 and signed on a Ledger device.
comment:optionalDependencies: Only needed for real Ledger CLEAR signing (USE_REAL_SIGNER=true); loaded lazily and optional so a failed/omitted install never breaks the simulated build. Per the Ledger Agent Stack docs, signing goes through the Device Management Kit: device-management-kit (core) + device-transport-kit-speculos (HTTP transport to a hosted Speculos) + device-signer-kit-ethereum (signTypedData) + context-module (clear-signing descriptor). CommonJS builds are loaded via createRequire because the DMK ESM builds use directory imports Node cannot resolve. rxjs drives the device-action observables; ethers verifies the typed data. See docs/speculos.md.
